issues.description: Effect text describes a game mechanic (preventing card activation during opponent's Refresh Phase) that is not representable in the current DSL action set. The effect requires a custom duration/condition that blocks activation during a specific phase, which has no equivalent in available actions (DrawCard, KO, ReturnToHand, PowerBoost, ForceDiscard, AddLife, GiveDon, FlipLife, AttachDon, GiveKeyword, Rest, RemoveLife, PlaySelf, SearchDeck, PlayFromHand, RevealFromHand, TrashFromHand, Win). Empty effects array does not capture the intended game mechanic.
